mapper.sql: id, user_id, ai_chat_bonus_weekly, insight_bonus_window, voice_chat_bonus_weekly, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_quota_adjustments (user_id, ai_chat_bonus_weekly, insight_bonus_window, voice_chat_bonus_weekly, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{aiChatBonusWeekly}, #{insightBonusWindow}, #{voiceChatBonusWeekly}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ai_chat_bonus_weekly = VALUES(ai_chat_bonus_weekly), insight_bonus_window = VALUES(insight_bonus_window), voice_chat_bonus_weekly = VALUES(voice_chat_bonus_weekly), updated_at = NOW()
